title: Ghana Personal Income Tax Return (Form DT 0103, ver. 1.1)
description: The Ghana Revenue Authority's (GRA) Domestic Tax Revenue Division form DT 0103, "Personal Income Tax Return" (ver. 1.1). Opens Ghana's Taxes vertical, via a single continuous 4-page return (not an annexed-schedule form): page 1 covers current-tax-office identification, the assessment year and return period, personal information, business information (with landlord particulars when the business premises are rented), and employment information; page 2 covers the four Sources-of-Income categories (net business income/loss, employment income with its own benefit-in-kind breakdown, investment and other income, and total income); pages 3-4 cover the full tax computation (add-backs, deductions, assessable income, reliefs, chargeable income, tax charged, payments, and tax payable/(overpaid)); page 4 closes with a two-path declaration (filing on one's own behalf, or on behalf of another person). This v1.0.0 models every applicant-facing field across all 4 pages. It deliberately does NOT model the raw signature-mark widgets (physical signature lines under both declaration paths are not data fields), consistent with this registry's general practice of excluding raw-signature/mark capture. The source is a printed, text-layer-only PDF with no AcroForm widgets (confirmed via pdfjs-dist: 0 widgets across all 4 pages) — every field below was extracted from the position-sorted text layer, not from widget metadata. Two numbering gaps are printed on the source itself (disclosed in VERIFICATION.md, not extraction artifacts, confirmed by rendering the page): page 2's Employment Income items jump from "v." directly to "vii." with no "vi." printed, and page 3's Reliefs items jump from "viii." directly to "x." with no "ix." printed; both totals' own parenthetical formulas ("Sum i to vi", "Sum of i to ix") still cite the skipped numeral. Ghana was opened as this registry's 41st jurisdiction via GOV-2510 (National ID vertical, gh/nia/ghana-card-application-form-1a). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Republic of Ghana or the Ghana Revenue Authority.

source.documentRef: DT 0103 (ver 1.1), "Personal Income Tax Return", Domestic Tax Revenue Division, Ghana Revenue Authority, published on GRA's Forms page (gra.gov.gh/forms/)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2697. Ghana was opened as this registry's 41st jurisdiction via GOV-2510 (National ID vertical, gh/nia/ghana-card-application-form-1a). This cycle opens Ghana's Taxes vertical via the Ghana Revenue Authority's (GRA) DT 0103 Personal Income Tax Return, located this cycle via a fresh fetch of gra.gov.gh/forms/ (HTTP 200) and independently re-derived (not copied from the task description): HTTP 200, application/pdf, 461527 bytes, sha256 b394df0bf108c710f6d681c3b261a8af11af35623c56436fb9e77b75c91c8359. Parsed with pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): getAnnotations({intent:'display'}) filtered to subtype==='Widget' confirmed 4 pages, 0 AcroForm widgets on every page — a printed, text-layer-only form. Every field was instead extracted by reading getTextContent()'s position-sorted text rows (grouped by rounded y, sorted by x within each row) directly. Two apparent numbering gaps (page 2 Employment Income items skip from v. to vii.; page 3 Reliefs items skip from viii. to x.) were independently confirmed as genuine source artifacts, not extraction bugs, by rendering both pages to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node canvas and visually inspecting the printed item labels. DMV (DVLA) was confirmed a dead end this cycle: DVLA's rebuilt site removed its old form PDFs. Passport, Business Formation, and Visa are being scouted/authored in parallel by sibling issues GOV-2696/GOV-2698 and were not touched by this schema. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, field-scoping decisions (including the Ghana Card PIN TIN-format judgment call), and the conformance run writeup.

fields.name: currentTaxOfficeLto
fields.label: Current tax office: LTO (Large Taxpayer Office)
fields.description: One of three mutually-exclusive current-tax-office-type checkboxes ("Tick One").

fields.name: currentTaxOfficeMto
fields.label: Current tax office: MTO (Medium Taxpayer Office)

fields.name: currentTaxOfficeSto
fields.label: Current tax office: STO (Small Taxpayer Office)

fields.name: graOfficeName
fields.label: Name of GRA Office
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "CURRENT TAX OFFICE": "Name of GRA Office"

fields.name: assessmentYear
fields.label: Year of Assessment
fields.description: The calendar year this return assesses, in 4-digit form.

fields.name: returnPeriodFrom
fields.label: Return period: from (dd/mm)
fields.description: The start of the return's basis period, printed as day/month only (no year on the source). Disclosed as the applicable accounting/basis period for the income being returned, since the source does not further describe its scope.

fields.name: returnPeriodTo
fields.label: Return period: to (dd/mm)
fields.description: The end of the return's basis period, printed as day/month only (no year on the source).

fields.name: taxpayerTin
fields.label: TIN
fields.description: The taxpayer's Taxpayer Identification Number. Since 1 April 2021, GRA no longer issues a separate individual TIN: an individual's Ghana Card Personal Identification Number (Ghana Card PIN) is used as their TIN instead (per GRA's own published policy, "Commencement of the use of Ghana Card Personal Identification Number as Taxpayer Identification Number"). The Ghana Card PIN's own published structure is "GHA-" followed by an 8- or 9-digit system-generated number and a 1-character checksum, hyphen-separated (e.g. "GHA-123456789-0") — sources are not fully consistent on 8 vs. 9 digits for the system-generated segment, so this pattern accepts either length, a disclosed judgment call since this specific form's own blank TIN line (printed 2020, before the PIN changeover) carries no digit-count guide of its own.

fields.name: businessDigitalAddress
fields.label: Location/GhanaPost Digital Address
fields.description: Applicable only when the filer reports business income; the source has no discrete boolean widget gating this on netBusinessIncomeOrLoss, so it is left optional rather than encoded with an unsupported requiredWhen.

fields.name: businessName
fields.label: Business Name(s)
fields.description: The source instructs: "If more than ONE provide the same information on a separate sheet."

fields.name: businessTenancyStatusRented
fields.label: Tenancy status of business: Rented
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive business-premises tenancy checkboxes. When ticked, the source directs the filer to "provide particulars of Landlord" (landlordName/landlordTelephoneNumbers/landlordTin below).
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 2 (BUSINESS INFORMATION): "Tenancy status of Business ... Rented"

fields.name: businessTenancyStatusOwned
fields.label: Tenancy status of business: Owned
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 2 (BUSINESS INFORMATION): "Tenancy status of Business ... Owned"

fields.name: landlordName
fields.label: Name of Landlord
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 2 (BUSINESS INFORMATION): "(If rented provide particulars of Landlord) Name of Landlord"

fields.name: landlordTin
fields.label: Landlord's TIN
fields.description: The source gives no format guide, and a landlord may be an individual (Ghana Card PIN) or a corporate entity (GRA's own legacy business-TIN format); no single pattern is asserted here, a disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: employerTin
fields.label: TIN of Employer
fields.description: Applicable only if employed; the source has no discrete boolean widget gating this, so it is left optional. No single pattern is asserted since an employer may be an individual or a corporate entity, each with a different TIN format — a disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: netBusinessIncomeOrLoss
fields.label: A. Net Business Income/Loss
fields.description: As per the financial statement attached (see the businessFinancialStatement document requirement). Can be negative (a loss); optional pass-through, 0/absent when the filer has no business income. The source's own instruction reads: "(Do you earn income from business? If No proceed to B)" — an instructional cue, not a discrete boolean widget, so it is not itself modeled as a field.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 4A: "NET BUSINESS INCOME/LOSS (As per financial Statement attached)"

fields.name: salaryBasicPay
fields.label: 4B.i. Basic salary
fields.description: Optional pass-through, 0/absent when not applicable. The source's own instruction reads: "(Do you earn income from employment? If No proceed to C)" — instructional only, not a discrete boolean widget.

fields.name: benefitInKindAccommodation
fields.label: 4B, Benefit in Kind, 1. Accommodation Benefit
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Benefit in Kind, item 1: "Accommodation Benefit"

fields.name: benefitInKindVehicle
fields.label: 4B, Benefit in Kind, 2. Vehicle Benefit
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Benefit in Kind, item 2: "Vehicle Benefit"

fields.name: benefitInKindOthers
fields.label: 4B, Benefit in Kind, 3. Others (e.g. Loan Benefit & Share Benefit etc.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Benefit in Kind, item 3: "Others e.g. Loan Benefit & Share Benefit etc."

fields.name: benefitInKindTotal
fields.label: 4B.v. Total Benefits in kind (sum of 1, 2 and 3)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 4B.v: "Total Benefits in kind (The sum of 1,2 and 3)"

fields.name: employmentOtherIncome
fields.label: 4B.vii. Others (e.g. Director's Fees)
fields.description: Printed immediately after item v. (Total Benefits in kind), with no item "vi." printed anywhere on the source — a numbering gap in the original form, confirmed by rendering the page (not an extraction artifact), disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: totalEmploymentIncome
fields.label: 4B. TOTAL EMPLOYMENT INCOME (Sum i to vi)
fields.description: The source's own parenthetical still reads "Sum i to vi" despite the last printed Employment Income line being labelled "vii." (see employmentOtherIncome) — the same disclosed numbering gap.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2: "TOTAL EMPLOYMENT INCOME ( Sum i to vi)"

fields.name: investmentIncomeRoyalty
fields.label: 4C.i. Royalty
fields.description: Optional pass-through, 0/absent when not applicable. The source's own instruction reads: "Do you [have] any investment income? (If No proceed to D)" — instructional only, not a discrete boolean widget.

fields.name: investmentIncomeOther
fields.label: 4C.vi. Other (e.g. Premium, Annuity, Discount etc.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 4C.vi: "Other ( e.g. Premium, Annuity, Discount etc.)"

fields.name: totalInvestmentAndOtherIncome
fields.label: 4C. TOTAL INVESTMENT INCOME & OTHER INCOMES (Sum i to vi)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2: "TOTAL INVESTMENT INCOME & OTHER INCOMES (Sum i to vi)"

fields.name: totalIncome
fields.label: 4D. TOTAL INCOME (Sum A, B, and C)
fields.description: Aggregate of Business, Employment, Investment & Other Income.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2: "D. TOTAL INCOME (Sum A, B, and C) (Business, Employment Investment & Other Income)"

fields.name: netBusinessProfitOrLoss
fields.label: 5A. Net Business Profit/Loss (same as 4A)
fields.description: Carried from netBusinessIncomeOrLoss (item 4A). Can be negative (a loss).
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5A: "NET BUSINESS PROFIT/LOSS ( Same as 4A )"

fields.name: addBackNonAllowableDeductions
fields.label: 5, Add Backs, ii. Non-allowable deductions
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Add Backs, item ii: "Non-allowable deductions"

fields.name: totalAddBacks
fields.label: 5B. Total Add Backs (sum i and ii)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5B: "Total Add Backs (sum i and ii )"

fields.name: adjustedBusinessProfitOrLoss
fields.label: 5C. Adjusted Business Profit/Loss (Sum A and B)
fields.description: Can be negative (an adjusted loss).
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5C: "ADJUSTED BUSINESS PROFIT/LOSS (Sum A and B)"

fields.name: deductAllowableDeduction
fields.label: 5, Deduct, ii. Allowable Deduction (Capital Allowance, Carry Forward Losses etc.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct, item ii: "Allowable Deduction (Capital Allowance, Carry Forward Losses etc.)"

fields.name: totalDeductions
fields.label: 5D. Total Deductions (sum i and ii)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5D: "TOTAL DEDUCTIONS ( sum i and ii )"

fields.name: netAdjustedBusinessProfitOrLoss
fields.label: 5E. Net Adjusted Business Profit/Loss (E = C - D)
fields.description: Can be negative (a net adjusted loss).

fields.name: totalInvestmentIncomeCarried
fields.label: 5F. Add Total Investment Income (same as 4C)
fields.description: Carried from totalInvestmentAndOtherIncome (item 4C).
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5F: "ADD TOTAL INVESTMENT INCOME (same as 4C)"

fields.name: totalEmploymentIncomeCarried
fields.label: 5G. Add Total Employment Income (same as 4B)
fields.description: Carried from totalEmploymentIncome (item 4B).

fields.name: incomeTaxedAtDifferentRates
fields.label: 5I. Income Taxed at Different Rates
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5I: "INCOME TAXED AT DIFFERENT RATES"

fields.name: reliefSocialSecurity
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, i. Social Security
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item i: "Social Security"

fields.name: reliefMarriageOrResponsibility
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, ii. Marriage / Responsibility
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item ii: "Marriage / Responsibility"

fields.name: reliefChildrensEducation
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, iii. Children's Education (up to 3 Children)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item iii: "Children's education (up to 3 Children)"

fields.name: reliefOldAge
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, iv. Old Age (employees aged 60 years or above)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item iv: "Old Age (For employees aged 60 years above)"

fields.name: reliefAgedDependents
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, v. Aged Dependents (up to 2 aged dependants)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item v: "Aged Dependents (up to 2 aged dependants.)"

fields.name: reliefDisability
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, vi. Disability
fields.description: Printed as "vi Disability", without the trailing period used by its neighboring items.

fields.name: reliefCostOfTraining
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, vii. Cost of Training
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item vii: "Cost of Training"

fields.name: reliefVoluntaryPensionContribution
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, viii. Voluntary Pension contribution (3rd tier provident fund)
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item viii: "Voluntary Pension contribution (3rd tier provident fund)"

fields.name: reliefOtherAllowableDeductions
fields.label: Deduct: Reliefs, x. Other allowable deductions
fields.description: Printed immediately after item viii. (Voluntary Pension contribution), with no item "ix." printed anywhere on the source — a second numbering gap in the original form, confirmed by rendering the page (not an extraction artifact), disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Deduct: Reliefs, item x: "Other allowable deductions"

fields.name: totalAllowableDeductionsReliefs
fields.label: 5K. Total Allowable Deductions/Reliefs (Sum of i to ix)
fields.description: The source's own parenthetical still reads "Sum of i to ix" despite the last printed Reliefs line being labelled "x." (see reliefOtherAllowableDeductions) — the same disclosed numbering gap.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 5K: "Total allowable deductions/reliefs (Sum of i to ix)"

fields.name: taxCharged
fields.label: 5M. Tax Charged
fields.description: Computed per Ghana's statutory progressive personal income tax bands (the current rate table published by GRA). This schema does not itself assert or embed the current band table; the field is modeled because the source itself presents it as a line the filer/preparer completes.

fields.name: paymentTaxCredits
fields.label: Less Payments, i. Tax Credits
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, Less Payments, item i: "Tax Credits"

fields.name: paymentOnAccount
fields.label: Less Payments, ii. Payment on Account (All Sources)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, Less Payments, item ii: "Payment on Account (All Sources)"

fields.name: totalPayments
fields.label: 5N. Total Payments (Sum of i to ii)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, item 5N: "TOTAL PAYMENTS (Sum of i to ii)"

fields.name: taxPayableOrOverpaid
fields.label: 5O. Tax Payable / (Overpaid) (M - N)
fields.description: Can be negative, indicating an overpaid/refund position.

fields.name: declarantNameSelf
fields.label: Declaration (a): declarant's name, filing on own behalf
fields.description: The blank in "I, [name], do hereby declare that the information contained in this return to the best of my knowledge is true, correct and complete." Only applicable when the filer signs the return themselves (declaration path (a)); the source presents two parallel declaration paragraphs, (a) and (b), with no discrete boolean widget selecting between them, so this and declarantNameOnBehalf are both left optional rather than encoded with an unsupported requiredWhen — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, DECLARATION (a) "For persons making return on their own behalf": "I ..., do hereby declare that the information contained in this return to the best of my knowledge is true, correct and complete."

fields.name: preparerRtpDetails
fields.label: Declaration (a): Registered Tax Practitioner (R.T.P.) details, if applicable
fields.description: The source prints "Signature ... OR" and, on the row below, "Date ... R.T.P" — read here as an alternative signing path where a Registered Tax Practitioner (R.T.P.) signs in place of the taxpayer, with no further discrete sub-fields printed for the R.T.P.'s own identifying/registration details. Modeled as a single free-text field for that information, a disclosed judgment call given the source's own terse layout.

fields.name: declarantNameOnBehalf
fields.label: Declaration (b): declarant's own name, filing on behalf of another person
fields.description: The blank in "I, [declarant's name] on behalf of [taxpayer's name], do hereby declare...". Only applicable under declaration path (b); see declarantNameSelf for the disclosed reasoning on why both paths' fields are optional.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, DECLARATION (b) "For persons making return on behalf of another person": "I ... on behalf of ..."

fields.name: taxpayerNameOnBehalf
fields.label: Declaration (b): name of the taxpayer being represented
fields.description: The second blank in "I, [declarant's name] on behalf of [taxpayer's name], do hereby declare...".

fields.name: relationshipToTaxpayer
fields.label: Declaration (b): declarant's relationship to the taxpayer

documents.label: Declaration that the return's information is true, correct and complete
documents.statement: I ... do hereby declare that the information contained in this return to the best of my knowledge is true, correct and complete.
documents.sourceRef: Page 4, "DECLARATION": paths (a) "For persons making return on their own behalf" and (b) "For persons making return on behalf of another person" share this same core statement.

documents.label: Financial statement supporting the Net Business Income/Loss figure
documents.handling: Enclosed in support of the netBusinessIncomeOrLoss figure, applicable only to a filer reporting business income.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, item 4A: "NET BUSINESS INCOME/LOSS (As per financial Statement attached)"
